channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月2日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Your Website Is Not for You #2 GhostBox – disposable little machines from the Global Free Tier. #3 Running Adobe's 1991 PostScript Interpreter in the Browser #4 Apple accidentally left Claude.md files Apple Support app #5 How Mark Klein told the EFF about Room 641A [book excerpt] #6 A Letter from Dijkstra on APL #7 New copy of earliest poem in English, written 1,3k years ago, discovered in Rome #8 Advanced Quantization Algorithm for LLMs #9 Show HN: Perfect Bluetooth MIDI for Windows #10 For Linux kernel vulnerabilities, there is no heads-up to distributions

item.title: 2026年5月2日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Credit cards are vulnerable to brute force attacks #2 Ti-84 Evo #3 New research suggests people can communicate and practice skills while dreaming #4 The Smelly Baby Problem #5 Show HN: Destiny – Claude Code's fortune Teller skill #6 Ask HN: Who is hiring? (May 2026) #7 Whimsical Animations Course Open House #8 SpaceX rocket set for unintentional Moon landing – well, a piece of it anyway #9 whohas – Command-line utility for cross-distro, cross-repository package search #10 City Learns Flock Accessed Cameras in Children's Gymnastics Room as a Sales Demo

item.title: 2026年5月1日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Belgium stops decommissioning nuclear power plants #2 Meta in row after workers who saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs #3 How an Oil Refinery Works #4 I aggregated 28 US Government auction sites into one search #5 You can beat the binary search #6 The FCC is about to ban 21% of its test labs today. I mapped them all #7 Granite 4.1: IBM's 8B Model Matching 32B MoE #8 Mozilla's Opposition to Chrome's Prompt API #9 The Zig project's rationale for their anti-AI contribution policy #10 Where the goblins came from

item.title: 2026年5月1日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
